bars.name: round-top rate (favored tops the focal trio, margin >= 0.10)
bars.basis: registered D-057(e)/D-058 (C1 keeps the focal-relative A(g) round bar; not C0-derived)

bars.name: persistence pass rate (runs demonstrating the lesson)
bars.basis: teaching cell N×filler=N=16,f=3: fraction of runs passing the primary persistence-margin bar

bars.name: persistence visible-margin floor (favored − worst)
bars.basis: teaching cell N×filler=N=16,f=3: 5th-pct favored−worst margin over defined runs

bars.name: tolerated favored NO_EVIDENCE rate (A(g) convention; §9.1)
bars.basis: teaching cell N×filler=N=16,f=3: favored-good NO_EVIDENCE rate

bars.name: change-making refusal pass rate (runs demonstrating the lesson)
bars.basis: teaching cell N×filler=N=16,f=1: fraction of runs passing the primary refusal-differential bar

bars.name: change-making refusal floor (indivisible − fine, per unit)
bars.basis: teaching cell N×filler=N=16,f=1: 5th-pct indivisible−fine divisibility-refusal rate; failable via A2:divisibility (collapses to 0)

bars.name: circulation corroborating pass rate (fine−indivisible margin ≥ 0.05; not the gate)
bars.basis: teaching cell N×filler=N=16,f=1: fraction of runs the circulation margin clears the floor (D-065: circulation corroborating)

bars.name: tolerated favored NO_EVIDENCE rate (A(g) convention; §9.1)
bars.basis: teaching cell N×filler=N=16,f=1: favored-good NO_EVIDENCE rate

bars.name: E1 regional-moneys-form rate (≥2 distinct regional leaders before convergence)
bars.basis: teaching cell N=16 round-robin (D-073); fails at single-region ablation (REGION_COUNT 1) (rate 0.000 < 0.6)

bars.name: E2 regions-merge rate (converged via an emerged winner, robust)
bars.basis: teaching cell N=16 round-robin (D-073); fails at regional-clustered placement (rate 0.000 < 0.65)

bars.name: E3 portability-decides-merge rate (high-port good wins+emerges, directional)
bars.basis: teaching cell N=16 round-robin (D-073); fails at N=12 round-robin (rate 0.056 < 0.45)
